# Safer Streets Model
This Bayesian analysis blends observed crash history with modeled expectations to
estimate mode-specific crash costs for each corridor. Results below highlight
the highest-cost segments as well as how modeled expectations compare with recent
observations.

```{python}
# | echo: false
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from IPython.display import Markdown, display
from src.global_vars import MODE_LABELS
from src.utils import analysis as analysis_utils
from src.utils import db, dashboard_func
from report_utils import map_utils
from report_utils.graph_utils import render_plotly_figure
from report_utils.render_guard import render_guard

MAP_FIG_SIZE = (16, 12)
MODE_SEQUENCE = ["ped", "bike", "mv"]

SAFER_STREETS_RESULTS = None
OBS_VS_EST = {}
_SETUP_OK = False

if study_id is None:
    display(Markdown("_Study context is missing; Safer Streets model outputs are unavailable._"))
else:
    _un, _sn = db.get_user_and_study_names(study_id)
    if not db.table_exists(f"bayesian_estimates_{_un}_{_sn}", "outputs"):
        display(Markdown(
            "_The Safer Streets Model has not been run for this study. "
            "Run the model from the Run Analysis tab to include this section._"
        ))
    else:
        with render_guard("Safer Streets Model results could not be loaded."):
            try:
                STUDY_AREA_GDF
            except NameError:
                STUDY_AREA_GDF = map_utils.get_study_area_gdf(study_id)

            SAFER_STREETS_RESULTS = analysis_utils.get_safer_streets_model_results(study_id)
            OBS_VS_EST = {
                mode: analysis_utils.get_observed_vs_estimated_by_mode(study_id, mode)
                for mode in MODE_SEQUENCE
            }
            _SETUP_OK = True


def _format_currency(value):
    return "$0" if value is None else f"${value:,.0f}"


def plot_safer_streets_map(mode):
    if not _SETUP_OK:
        return  # section-level message already displayed in setup cell
    gdf = SAFER_STREETS_RESULTS
    show_col = f"show_{mode}"
    if gdf is None or gdf.empty or not gdf[show_col].any():
        return
    gdf = gdf[gdf[show_col]]
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=MAP_FIG_SIZE)
    map_utils.plot_safer_streets_map(
        ax=ax,
        mode=mode,
        segments_gdf=gdf,
        study_area_gdf=STUDY_AREA_GDF,
    )
    plt.show()


def render_safer_streets_table(mode, limit=10):
    if not _SETUP_OK:
        return
    df = SAFER_STREETS_RESULTS
    show_col = f"show_{mode}"
    if df is None or df.empty or not df[show_col].any():
        return
    table_df = (
        df.loc[df[show_col], ["road_name", "functional_class", f"{mode}_cost"]]
        .sort_values(by=f"{mode}_cost", ascending=False)
        .head(limit)
        .rename(
            columns={
                "road_name": "Corridor Name",
                "functional_class": "Functional Class",
                f"{mode}_cost": "Crash Cost",
            }
        )
    )
    table_df["Crash Cost"] = table_df["Crash Cost"].map(_format_currency)
    display(Markdown(table_df.to_markdown(index=False)))


def render_observed_vs_estimated(mode):
    if not _SETUP_OK:
        return  # section-level message already displayed in setup cell
    df = OBS_VS_EST.get(mode)
    if df is None or df.empty:
        print("Observed vs. modeled summaries are unavailable.")
        return
    fig = dashboard_func.observed_vs_estimated_bar(df)
    render_plotly_figure(fig, height=fig.layout.height or 400)
    formatted = df.copy()
    formatted["Observed Crashes"] = formatted["Observed Crashes"].map(
        lambda v: f"{v:,.0f}"
    )
    formatted["Modeled Adjusted Crashes"] = formatted["Modeled Adjusted Crashes"].map(
        lambda v: f"{v:,.1f}"
    )
    display(Markdown(formatted.to_markdown(index=False)))
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: true
if _SETUP_OK:
    _MODE_LABELS = {"ped": "Pedestrian", "bike": "Bicycle", "mv": "Motor Vehicle"}

    for mode, display_name in _MODE_LABELS.items():
        # start a new page for each mode except the first one
        if mode != "ped": 
            display(Markdown("{{< pagebreak >}}"))
        display(Markdown(f"## {display_name} Safer Streets Model"))
        with render_guard(f"{display_name} Safer Streets map could not be rendered."):
            plot_safer_streets_map(mode)
            display(Markdown("{{< pagebreak >}}"))
        display(Markdown(f"### Observed vs. Modeled {display_name} Crashes by Severity"))
        with render_guard(f"{display_name} observed vs. modeled data not available."):
            render_observed_vs_estimated(mode)
```
